'''Larrad Shrike''' was the brother of [[Garris Shrike]]. Shrike was a tall, heavy-set [[Human/Legends|Human]] male who carried a [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]]. He was allowed to be armed aboard [[Liberator (Liberator-class)|''Trader's Luck'']] because he was an [[Officer/Legends|officer]]. Shrike was severely injured aboard ''Trader's Luck'' by the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Dewlannamapia|Dewlanna]] when a young [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] made his escape. Dewlanna, in rage, pulled and twisted his arm. Several pops were heard as tendons and ligaments gave way. When Garris Shrike found Solo on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], he remarked about Larrad Shrike's injury from Dewlanna, that he had never been the same.
